name: MNTN, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview MNTN is on a mission to transform CTV into a next-generation performance marketing channel. Our revolutionary PTV software platform allows marketers to combine the powerful storytelling format of TV advertising with the targeting, measurement and attribution capabilities of paid search and social advertising.
